requirements.description: The ShopEase platform must be live within 6 months from project start. This is a hard deadline set by the client CEO.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is fully deployed and accessible to end users within 6 months of project kickoff

requirements.description: RetailCorp India is a mid-size retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores across India. The e-commerce platform is a greenfield online channel.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Average order value is approximately INR 15,000, with high-ticket items such as home appliances, electronics, and furniture. EMI options are mandatory due to high per-item costs.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: EMI option is presented at checkout for eligible order values

requirements.description: The platform must support credit card, debit card, UPI, and net banking as payment methods. All four methods must be available at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete payment using credit card
Customer can complete payment using debit card
Customer can complete payment using UPI
Customer can complete payment using net banking

requirements.description: The platform must support credit card EMI and no-cost EMI through financing partners including Bajaj Finance and ZestMoney. This requires API integration with these financing partners.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select credit card EMI at checkout
Customer can select no-cost EMI via Bajaj Finance at checkout
EMI options are displayed with tenure and interest details

requirements.description: An existing agreement with Bajaj Finance is in place and integration can proceed. ZestMoney integration is contingent on a pending commercial agreement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: End customers are the primary users who browse the catalog and place orders on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Store managers are regional users responsible for viewing orders from their region and managing returns. Each physical store has one store manager.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Central admin team manages all products, pricing, and promotions across the platform. They have the highest level of administrative access.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Vendor partners are third-party sellers who list products on the platform and require a dedicated login to manage their inventory and product information.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The system must support four distinct user roles with separate login portals: end customer, store manager, central admin, and vendor partner.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Each role can log in with role-specific credentials
Each role sees only the features and data relevant to their role

requirements.description: Store managers must be able to view orders filtered by their region and manage return requests for those orders.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays only orders from their assigned region
Store manager can initiate or approve return requests

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage their product listings and inventory through their portal. Vendors cannot set or modify product prices.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can update product descriptions and images
Vendor can update inventory quantities
Vendor portal does not expose any pricing fields

requirements.description: All product pricing is controlled exclusively by RetailCorp's central admin team. Vendors are not permitted to set or modify prices.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Price fields are editable only by central admin role
Any attempt by vendor role to modify price is rejected by the system

requirements.description: The current product catalog contains approximately 8,000 SKUs in SAP ERP. The catalog is expected to scale to 25,000 SKUs once vendor onboarding is complete.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: The platform must integrate with the client's SAP ERP system to sync product data and inventory. This integration must support both real-time and batch sync modes.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Inventory levels are synced from SAP in real time
Product information is synced from SAP via daily batch process
Sync failures are logged and alerted

requirements.description: Inventory availability must be synced with SAP in real time to prevent displaying out-of-stock products as available. Product information sync can run as a daily batch.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: A product sold in-store is reflected as out-of-stock online within the real-time sync window
Product information updates from SAP appear on the platform within 24 hours

requirements.description: The platform must provide a product search capability allowing customers to search by product name, category, and brand.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name
Search returns relevant results when queried by category
Search returns relevant results when queried by brand

requirements.description: The platform must support product filtering by price range, brand, customer ratings, and estimated delivery time.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can filter search results by price range
Customer can filter search results by brand
Customer can filter search results by rating
Customer can filter search results by delivery time

requirements.description: Customers must be able to submit product reviews and ratings. All reviews must go through a moderation workflow before being published.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a text review and star rating on a product page
Submitted review is held in pending state until approved by admin
Review is visible to other customers only after admin approval

requirements.description: Customers must be able to add products to a wishlist for future reference. The wishlist must be accessible from the customer's account.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to their wishlist from the product page
Customer can view all wishlisted products in their account
Customer can remove a product from their wishlist

requirements.description: The platform must integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart logistics APIs to retrieve real-time shipping rates and provide order tracking.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rate from Delhivery and BlueDart is displayed at checkout
Customer can track their shipment status in real time from the platform

requirements.description: Customers must be able to track their order status in real time directly from the platform without navigating to a third-party logistics site.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Order detail page displays live tracking status fetched from logistics partner API
Tracking status updates without requiring a page refresh or within a defined polling interval

requirements.description: The platform must comply with GDPR regulations to support NRI customers. It must also comply with the Indian IT Act.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform provides a cookie consent mechanism
Platform provides a data deletion/right-to-be-forgotten workflow
Platform complies with Indian IT Act data protection provisions

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored exclusively on servers located within India. No customer data may be stored or processed outside India.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Cloud infrastructure hosting customer data is provisioned in an Indian data center region
No customer PII is transmitted to or stored in servers outside India

requirements.description: The platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users to support peak traffic during sale events such as Diwali.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load test confirms platform remains stable and functional under 50,000 concurrent user sessions
No critical errors or downtime occur during peak load simulation

requirements.description: All platform pages must load within 3 seconds under normal and peak traffic conditions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Page load time measured at P95 is under 3 seconds during load testing
Page load time is under 3 seconds for key pages (home, PDP, cart, checkout) under peak load

requirements.description: The platform must provide sales reports with daily, weekly, and monthly views, segmented by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate a sales report filtered by date range (daily/weekly/monthly)
Report can be segmented by region, category, and vendor
Report data is exportable

requirements.description: The platform must provide cart abandonment analytics showing which products customers viewed or added to cart but did not purchase.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Analytics dashboard displays products with high cart abandonment rates
Report shows number of times a product was added to cart vs. purchased

requirements.description: The platform must support sending promotional emails and SMS to customers, either via a built-in marketing tool or integration with a third-party marketing platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create and send a promotional email campaign to a customer segment
Admin can create and send a promotional SMS campaign to a customer segment
Customers can opt out of marketing communications

requirements.description: The platform must support migration of existing product data from the client's SAP ERP system as part of the initial go-live. Approximately 8,000 SKUs need to be migrated.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: All existing SAP product records are successfully imported into the platform before go-live
Migrated product data is validated for completeness and accuracy

requirements.description: The platform must be scalable to support a product catalog of at least 25,000 SKUs as vendor onboarding increases catalog size.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform search and catalog browsing performance meets the 3-second page load SLA with 25,000 active SKUs

requirements.description: ZestMoney integration will be included in scope but may be delivered post-launch pending commercial agreement finalization. Bajaj Finance integration is confirmed in scope.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is the Client Project Manager responsible for defining technical and operational requirements and acting as the primary client contact.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is the Client CEO and executive sponsor, responsible for defining business vision, priorities, and final decisions on platform scope.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is the Business Analyst on the delivery team responsible for eliciting and documenting requirements.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is the Project Manager on the delivery team responsible for project planning, delivery coordination, and integration scoping.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: Product reviews submitted by customers must not be published until explicitly approved by an admin moderator. Unmoderated reviews must not be visible to other customers.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: No review is visible on the product page without an admin approval action
Admin has a moderation queue to review, approve, or reject submitted reviews

requirements.description: The platform must be designed to scale elastically to handle sudden traffic spikes during promotional sale events without degradation in performance.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Auto-scaling is configured to add capacity when CPU or request thresholds are breached
Platform recovers to normal performance within a defined SLA after a traffic spike

requirements.description: The platform must use a cloud infrastructure provider with data center presence in India to satisfy the data residency requirement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: All production workloads and databases are deployed in an India-region cloud zone

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using their email address or mobile number so that their details are saved and they can track orders. Registration must create a unique customer account upon successful verification.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can register using a valid email address
Customer can register using a valid mobile number
Duplicate email or mobile number registration is rejected with an appropriate error message
A verification email or OTP is sent upon registration
Account is activated only after successful verification
Registered customer can view and track their orders after login

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in using email and password or OTP so that they can access their account and purchase history. Both authentication methods must be available at all times.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in with a registered email and correct password
Customer can log in using an OTP sent to their registered mobile number or email
Invalid credentials display a clear error message without revealing which field is incorrect
OTP expires after a configurable time period (default 5 minutes)
Successful login redirects the customer to their account dashboard
Purchase history is visible and accurate after login

requirements.description: The system shall enforce secure authentication practices so that customer accounts are protected from unauthorized access. Login attempts must be rate-limited to prevent brute-force attacks.
acceptance_criteria: Passwords are stored using a strong hashing algorithm (e.g., bcrypt)
Account is temporarily locked after 5 consecutive failed login attempts
All authentication traffic is transmitted over HTTPS/TLS
OTP is single-use and invalidated after successful login

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search for products by name, brand, or category so that they can quickly locate desired items. Search results must be returned in a ranked and relevant order.
acceptance_criteria: Search bar is accessible from all pages of the platform
Searching by product name returns matching products
Searching by brand name returns all products of that brand
Searching by category returns all products in that category
Partial and case-insensitive search terms return relevant results
A 'no results found' message is displayed when no matches exist

requirements.description: The system shall return search results within an acceptable response time so that customers experience fast and responsive search. Performance must be maintained under peak load conditions.
acceptance_criteria: Search results are returned within 2 seconds under normal load
Search performance does not degrade beyond 4 seconds under peak load
Search functionality supports at least 1000 concurrent users

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price range, brand, rating, and estimated delivery time so that they can narrow down products to those that meet their needs. Multiple filters must be applicable simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can filter results by a minimum and maximum price range
Customer can filter results by one or more brands
Customer can filter results by minimum star rating
Customer can filter results by estimated delivery time (e.g., same day, next day, within 3 days)
Multiple filters can be applied at the same time
Applied filters are clearly displayed and individually removable
Result count updates dynamically as filters are applied

requirements.description: The system shall display a detailed product page including name, images, description, specifications, price, availability, and customer reviews so that customers can make informed purchase decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Product page displays product name, brand, and category
At least one product image is shown with zoom capability
Product description and key specifications are displayed
Current price and any applicable discount are clearly shown
Stock availability status is displayed (in stock / out of stock)
Average rating and individual customer reviews are visible
Estimated delivery date is shown on the product page

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart so that they can review and purchase multiple items in a single transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to the cart from the product detail page or search results
Cart displays all added products with name, quantity, unit price, and subtotal
Customer can update the quantity of items in the cart
Customer can remove individual items from the cart
Cart total is recalculated automatically when items are added, removed, or quantities changed
Cart contents persist across sessions for logged-in customers
Out-of-stock products cannot be added to the cart

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to save products to a wishlist so that they can return and purchase those items at a later time.
acceptance_criteria: Logged-in customer can add a product to their wishlist from the product page or search results
Wishlist is accessible from the customer's account dashboard
Customer can view all saved products in the wishlist
Customer can move a product from the wishlist directly to the cart
Customer can remove products from the wishlist
Wishlist persists across sessions and devices for the same account

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add multiple delivery addresses and select one during checkout so that orders are dispatched to the correct location.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a new delivery address with full address fields (name, street, city, state, PIN code, phone)
Customer can save multiple delivery addresses to their account
Customer can select a saved address during checkout
Customer can edit or delete saved addresses
Selected delivery address is clearly displayed on the order summary before payment
PIN code validation confirms serviceability before order placement

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI so that customers can complete purchases using their preferred payment method.
acceptance_criteria: All five payment methods (credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, EMI) are available at checkout
Payment is processed securely and a confirmation is shown upon success
Failed payments display a clear error message and allow retry without losing cart contents
EMI options display available tenures and interest rates before selection
A payment receipt or order confirmation is sent to the customer via email or SMS after successful payment

requirements.description: The system shall process all payment transactions in compliance with PCI-DSS standards so that customer financial data is protected at all times.
acceptance_criteria: Payment processing is PCI-DSS compliant
Card details are never stored on the platform's own servers
All payment data is transmitted over TLS 1.2 or higher
Payment gateway integration uses tokenization for saved payment methods

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking so that they can monitor the current status and estimated arrival time of their delivery.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view the current status of each order (e.g., confirmed, packed, shipped, out for delivery, delivered)
Tracking page displays the shipment's current location or last known checkpoint
Estimated delivery date and time are shown and updated in real time
Customer receives push notification or SMS when order status changes
Tracking information is accessible from the order history page without re-entering any details

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who have received a delivered product to submit a written review and star rating so that other customers can benefit from their experience.
acceptance_criteria: Only customers with a confirmed delivered order for the product can submit a review
Review form includes a star rating (1–5) and a text field for written feedback
Customer can submit only one review per purchased product
Customer can edit their review after submission before it is approved
Submitted review is visible to the customer as 'pending approval' until published

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with a review moderation interface to approve or reject customer-submitted reviews so that only appropriate content is published on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a list of all pending reviews with reviewer name, product, rating, and review text
Admin can approve a review, making it publicly visible on the product page
Admin can reject a review with a reason, preventing it from being published
Customer is notified when their review is approved or rejected
Approved and rejected reviews are logged with admin ID and timestamp for audit purposes

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog so that the platform always displays accurate and current product information.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can add a new product with all required fields (name, brand, category, description, images, price, SKU)
Admin can edit any field of an existing product
Admin can deactivate a product, making it invisible to customers without deleting it
Deactivated products are not returned in customer search results or browsing
All catalog changes are logged with admin ID, action type, and timestamp
Changes are reflected on the platform within a configurable time (default: immediately)

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to set and update product prices and discount configurations so that customers always see correct and current pricing.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can set a base price for each product
Admin can create a discount as a percentage or fixed amount for a product
Admin can set a start and end date for time-limited discounts
Discounted price and original price are both displayed to customers when a discount is active
Price updates are reflected on the platform immediately upon saving
All price and discount changes are logged with admin ID and timestamp

requirements.description: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time so that product availability shown to customers is always accurate and out-of-stock items are never listed as available.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory levels are pulled from SAP and reflected on the platform within a configurable sync interval (default: real time or near real time ≤ 5 minutes)
Products with zero inventory are automatically marked as out of stock and cannot be added to cart
Products returning to stock are automatically re-listed as available
Sync failures trigger an alert to the system administrator
A sync status log is maintained showing last successful sync timestamp and any errors

requirements.description: The SAP inventory sync integration shall be reliable and fault-tolerant so that inventory data discrepancies between SAP and the platform are minimized.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory sync latency does not exceed 5 minutes under normal operating conditions
The system retries failed sync attempts automatically with exponential backoff
Integration uptime for the SAP sync service is at least 99.5%

requirements.description: The system shall provide vendors with a self-service interface to manage their product listings so that their products are accurately represented on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in to a dedicated vendor portal
Vendor can add new product listings with required details (name, description, images, price, stock quantity)
Vendor can edit existing product listing details
Vendor can activate or deactivate their own product listings
Vendor can only manage their own listings and cannot access other vendors' data
Listing changes are subject to admin review before going live (or go live immediately based on configured policy)

requirements.description: The system shall allow store managers to view all orders placed by customers within their assigned region so that they can coordinate local deliveries and manage returns effectively.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can log in and view a dashboard scoped to their assigned region
Order list displays order ID, customer name, items, order status, and delivery address
Store manager can filter orders by status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, return requested)
Store manager can view the details of any individual order in their region
Store manager cannot view or access orders outside their assigned region

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor so that they can make informed business decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a sales report filtered by daily, weekly, or monthly time periods
Admin can filter sales reports by product category
Admin can filter sales reports by region
Admin can filter sales reports by vendor
Reports display total revenue, number of orders, and units sold for the selected filters
Reports can be exported in CSV or PDF format

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to view a report of products that customers add to their cart but do not purchase so that conversion issues can be identified and addressed.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a cart abandonment report listing products added to cart but not purchased
Report shows product name, number of times added to cart, number of times purchased, and abandonment rate
Report can be filtered by date range, category, and region
Report data is refreshed at least daily
Report can be exported in CSV format

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to create and send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS so that targeted promotions can drive traffic and sales during promotional events.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a campaign with a subject, message body, and target audience segment
Admin can schedule a campaign for immediate or future delivery
Campaign can be sent via email, SMS, or both simultaneously
Admin can view campaign delivery status (sent, delivered, failed) and open/click rates for email
Customers who have opted out of marketing communications are automatically excluded from campaigns
Campaign history is retained and viewable by admin

requirements.description: The promotional campaign system shall comply with applicable communication and data privacy regulations so that customer consent preferences are respected and the platform avoids regulatory penalties.
acceptance_criteria: All marketing emails include an unsubscribe link compliant with applicable regulations (e.g., CAN-SPAM, GDPR)
Customer opt-out requests are processed within 24 hours
Customer communication preferences are stored and honored across all channels

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional native or responsive mobile application for Android and iOS so that customers can browse and purchase products conveniently from their mobile devices.
acceptance_criteria: The ShopEase application is available for download on the Google Play Store (Android) and Apple App Store (iOS)
All core customer-facing features (browse, search, cart, checkout, order tracking) are available on the mobile app
The mobile app supports the two latest major versions of Android and iOS
The app UI is optimized for mobile screen sizes and touch interaction
App performance meets acceptable load time standards (pages load within 3 seconds on a standard 4G connection)

requirements.description: The mobile application shall deliver acceptable performance on standard mobile hardware and network conditions so that customers have a smooth and responsive experience.
acceptance_criteria: App cold start time is under 3 seconds on mid-range Android and iOS devices
Page transitions and interactions respond within 1 second under a standard 4G connection
App does not crash under normal usage scenarios during regression testing

requirements.description: The system shall provide an executive mobile dashboard displaying key business metrics so that CEOs and executives can stay informed about business performance from their mobile devices.
acceptance_criteria: Executive dashboard is accessible via the mobile app with role-based access control
Dashboard displays key metrics including total revenue, number of orders, and active users for configurable time periods
Metrics are presented in a visually clear format (charts, KPI cards) optimized for mobile screens
Dashboard data is refreshed at least every 15 minutes
Access to the executive dashboard is restricted to users with the CEO/executive role

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product so that they can receive a refund if the product is defective or not as described.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can initiate a return request from their order history for any delivered order within the return eligibility window
Return request form requires the customer to select a reason (e.g., defective, not as described, wrong item)
Customer receives a confirmation of the return request with a reference number
Return eligibility window is configurable by admin (default: 7 days from delivery)
Customer is notified of the return status (approved, rejected, refund processed) via email or SMS
Approved returns trigger a refund to the original payment method within a defined SLA

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart APIs so that shipping rates are calculated automatically at checkout and real-time order tracking is available to customers.
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rates from Delhivery and BlueDart are fetched and displayed to the customer during checkout based on delivery address and order weight/dimensions
Customer can select their preferred shipping carrier and service level at checkout
Upon order confirmation, a shipment is automatically created with the selected carrier via API
Tracking numbers from Delhivery and BlueDart are stored against the order and displayed on the tracking page
API integration failures are handled gracefully with fallback messaging and admin alerts
Integration is tested against both Delhivery and BlueDart sandbox environments before go-live

requirements.description: The logistics API integrations shall be resilient and maintain high availability so that shipping rate calculation and tracking are not disrupted by transient carrier API failures.
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rate API calls time out after a configurable threshold (default: 5 seconds) to prevent checkout delays
The system retries failed carrier API calls up to 3 times before surfacing an error
Carrier API downtime does not prevent order placement; a fallback estimated shipping cost is displayed if the API is unavailable

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India Pvt. Ltd. to enable online retail of home appliances, electronics, and furniture
glossary.RetailCorp India: The client organization, a mid-size retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores across India, operating as the business owner of the ShopEase platform
glossary.Central Admin Team: RetailCorp's internal team with the highest level of administrative access, responsible for managing all products, pricing, promotions, and platform operations
glossary.Store Manager: A regional user role assigned to managers of individual physical stores, with access to view regional orders and manage return requests
glossary.Vendor Partner: A third-party seller who lists products on the ShopEase platform and manages their own inventory through a dedicated vendor portal, without pricing authority
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit — a unique identifier for each distinct product variant in the catalog; current catalog contains ~8,000 SKUs expected to scale to 25,000
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An equated monthly installment payment option where the customer pays no interest, facilitated through financing partners such as Bajaj Finance or ZestMoney
glossary.SAP ERP: The client's existing enterprise resource planning system used as the master source for product catalog data and inventory levels, requiring real-time integration with ShopEase
glossary.Data Residency: The regulatory and contractual requirement that all customer data must be stored and processed exclusively on servers physically located within India
glossary.Delhivery: A third-party logistics provider whose API will be integrated into ShopEase for real-time shipping rate calculation and order tracking
glossary.BlueDart: A second third-party logistics provider whose API will be integrated into ShopEase alongside Delhivery for shipping rate calculation and tracking
glossary.ZestMoney: A financing partner being considered for no-cost EMI integration; inclusion in scope is contingent on finalization of a commercial agreement post-launch
glossary.Bajaj Finance: A confirmed financing partner with an existing commercial agreement, enabling no-cost EMI integration at platform launch
glossary.Review Moderation Workflow: The process by which customer-submitted product reviews are held in a pending state and must be explicitly approved by a central admin moderator before being published
glossary.Cart Abandonment Analytics: A reporting feature that tracks products customers viewed or added to their cart but did not proceed to purchase, used for marketing and conversion optimization
glossary.PCI-DSS: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard — the compliance framework governing secure handling of customer payment card data during transactions
glossary.EMI: Equated Monthly Installment — a payment method allowing customers to split large purchases into fixed monthly payments, critical for high-ticket items averaging INR 15,000
glossary.Executive Mobile Dashboard: A mobile interface providing CEOs and senior executives with real-time visibility into key business metrics without requiring access to the full admin portal
